data.title: Crypto Security Incidents Lead to Significant Losses in April 2026
data.description: April 2026 has been marked as a challenging period for the cryptocurrency sector, with security incidents resulting in losses exceeding $606 million, according to DeFiLlama data. This figure is 3.7 times greater than the total losses recorded in the entire first quarter. According to NS3.AI, April 2026 stands out as the worst month for such losses since February 2025, highlighting ongoing vulnerabilities within the crypto space.

data.title: SharpLink's cumulative Ethereum staking rewards have surpassed 18,000 ETH.
data.description: Ethereum treasury company SharpLink announced on the X platform that since launching its ETH treasury strategy, the company's cumulative Ethereum staking rewards have reached 18,309 ETH. In addition, the company earned 459 ETH in Ethereum staking rewards last week.

data.title: Caixin: SpaceX's free-float market capitalization on its first day of IPO may be between $440 billion and $530 billion.
data.description: Caixin.com published an article titled "SpaceX's $1.75 Trillion IPO is Imminent: Who Should Buy? Is it Worth Buying?", which points out that Wall Street has never encountered a listed company with such a massive IPO size and such a complex relationship with the US government. Nasdaq has previously passed a new "Fast Entry" rule, allowing newly listed companies whose market capitalization ranks in the top 40 of the Nasdaq 100 index to be quickly included within 15 trading days of listing. This rule will officially take effect on May 1, 2026, and is considered to be designed specifically for the upcoming SpaceX IPO, while also paving the way for OpenAI and Anthropic, which may list in 2026 or 2027. Assuming SpaceX lists with a $1.75 trillion valuation and a free float of 25% to 30%, its free float market capitalization on the first day of the IPO would be approximately between $440 billion and $530 billion. Based on the Nasdaq 100 weighting, SpaceX would directly enter the top ten weighted stocks. Market sources indicate that the S&P 500 is also evaluating some form of "fast-track inclusion," details of which have not yet been released. (Caixin)

data.title: Blockchain Remittance System to Be Tested by Dunamu, Hana Financial Group, and POSCO International
data.description: Dunamu, Hana Financial Group, and POSCO International have entered into a memorandum of understanding (MoU) to explore the use of blockchain technology for remittance systems in real trade transactions. According to NS3.AI, POSCO International will be the first to implement this system in live transactions. The collaboration follows a successful proof of concept that demonstrated reduced settlement times and costs compared to the traditional SWIFT-based process. The companies aim to develop a functional model for real-time blockchain remittances by the end of the year.

data.title: MoonPay acquires crypto security startup Sodot in an all-stock transaction for $100 million.
data.description: MoonPay announced its acquisition of Israeli crypto security startup Sodot in a $100 million all-stock transaction. Following the acquisition, Sodot will be integrated into MoonPay Institutional, a newly formed division. MoonPay Institutional will reportedly provide various cryptocurrency and blockchain services to large traditional financial institutions, including trading, tokenized securities, payments, wallet management, and stablecoin issuance. The division is led by Caroline D. Pham, who joined MoonPay last December as Chief Legal Officer and Chief Administrative Officer. She previously served as Acting Chair of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). (Bloomberg)

data.title: XBIT's trading volume exceeded $36 million in just one month after its launch, ranking it among the top 4 Polymarket Builders.
data.description: As of the end of April, crypto trading aggregator XBIT ranked 4th on the Polymarket Builder official leaderboard with a monthly trading volume of $36.12 million. The project officially launched in early April, and XBIT recently passed the Polymarket Builder official review. Currently, XBIT offers two core product categories: prediction markets and perpetual contracts (Perp DEX). The next step is to launch leveraged prediction markets to further enrich the aggregated trading experience.

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Vitalik sold 40 million ASTEROIDs, cashing out approximately $114,600; 2. Kyber hackers transferred stolen funds to Tornado Cash; the hackers involved had previously been indicted by the FBI; 3. A whale is suspected of liquidating 3,418 ETH, with an estimated profit exceeding $1.32 million; 4. The South Korean National Tax Service has begun preparations for virtual asset taxation, scheduled for implementation in January next year; 5. a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen changed the banner on his X account; 6. Ronin will migrate to Ethereum Layer 2 on May 12, and the RON inflation rate will drop below 1%; 7. Trump: Iran should sign a nuclear-free agreement as soon as possible; 8. MegaETH will launch another eight-week Odyssey on the eve of TGE, with a 97% probability of TGE tomorrow; 9. QCP: The market has turned cautious and wait-and-see, with Bitcoin maintaining range-bound trading; 10. BIT: Bitcoin has risen for two consecutive months, and market momentum shows signs of recovery.

data.title: OKX will launch AI perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will officially launch the AIUSDT perpetual contract on its web, app and API platforms at 20:00 (UTC+8) on April 29, 2026.

data.title: India's Finance Ministry Warns of Challenges in Balancing Growth and Inflation Due to Price Pressures
data.description: India's Finance Ministry has issued a report highlighting the difficulties posed by elevated price pressures in managing the balance between economic growth and inflation. According to Jin10, the report suggests that the ongoing high prices could complicate policy decisions aimed at fostering growth while controlling inflation. The ministry's analysis underscores the need for careful consideration in policy-making to address these economic challenges.

data.title: India's Finance Ministry Reports Decline in Employment Optimism
data.description: India's Finance Ministry has released a report indicating that while the one-year employment outlook remains positive, there is a noticeable decline in optimism regarding future job prospects. According to Jin10, the report highlights a shift in sentiment, suggesting a decrease in confidence about employment opportunities in the coming year.

data.title: Tether Leads $14 Million Series A Funding Round for Belo
data.description: Tether has spearheaded a $14 million Series A funding round for Belo, marking the stablecoin issuer's continued expansion into the Latin American market. According to NS3.AI, other participants in the funding round included Titan Fund, The Venture City, Mindset Ventures, and G2. The announcement did not reveal Belo's valuation.

data.title: India's Finance Ministry Warns of Rupee Depreciation Impact on Inflation
data.description: India's Finance Ministry has reported that the continuous depreciation of the rupee is expected to create additional pressure on domestic inflation. According to Jin10, this depreciation could lead to an increase in import prices, further affecting the country's economic stability.

data.title: Tether Expands in Latin America with Investment in Argentine Crypto Platform Belo
data.description:
Tether is expanding its presence in Latin America by investing in the Argentine cryptocurrency platform Belo. According to Bloomberg, this move marks a significant step for Tether as it seeks to strengthen its foothold in the region.

The investment in Belo underscores Tether's commitment to increasing its influence in Latin America's growing crypto market. This strategic decision aligns with Tether's broader efforts to enhance its operations and reach within the region. The partnership with Belo is expected to facilitate greater access to Tether's stablecoin offerings for users in Argentina and potentially beyond.

This development comes as part of Tether's ongoing strategy to capitalize on the increasing adoption of cryptocurrencies in Latin America. By investing in local platforms like Belo, Tether aims to provide more robust financial solutions and expand its user base in the region.

data.title: Aftermath Finance Halts Operations Following Exploit Discovery
data.description: Aftermath Finance has temporarily suspended its operations after detecting an exploit in its perpetual futures section on Sui. According to NS3.AI, the company stated that the pause is a precautionary measure as it collaborates with its primary security partners to investigate the issue. Aftermath Finance is actively working to mitigate any potential impact on user funds.

data.title: MoonPay Acquires Israeli Crypto Security Startup Sodot
data.description: MoonPay Inc. has announced the acquisition of Sodot, an Israeli crypto security startup. According to Bloomberg, this move is part of MoonPay's strategy to establish a new unit dedicated to meeting the institutional demand for digital assets. The acquisition aims to enhance MoonPay's capabilities in providing secure and reliable services to institutional clients in the digital asset space.

data.title: BlackRock transferred 1,473 BTC and 5,738 ETH to Coinbase, worth approximately $128 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, BlackRock transferred 1,473 BTC and 5,738 ETH to Coinbase, with a total value of approximately $128 million. Of this, the BTC was worth approximately $114.34 million and the ETH was worth approximately $13.38 million.

data.title: Analyst Predicts Dollar Rise Amid Fed's Hawkish Stance on Inflation
data.description: On April 29, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group's bank analyst Derek Halpenny stated in a report that if the Federal Reserve acknowledges that the Iran war has driven up energy prices, potentially leading to increased inflation, it may adopt a 'hawkish' stance. According to Jin10, Halpenny noted that this rate decision might be the last meeting under U.S. President Donald Trump's Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Powell could emphasize the accumulating risks to price stability during the press conference. This scenario might cause the front end of the U.S. yield curve to jump and strengthen initial signs of improved dollar demand. Halpenny also mentioned that risks are accumulating for a weaker euro against the dollar and a stronger dollar against the yen.

data.title: Binance Launches ST Trading Competition with $200K in Rewards
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X the commencement of the ST Trading Competition, offering participants the chance to win a share of $200,000 in rewards. The competition introduces a new mechanic called the Early Bird Multiplier, which incentivizes early trading activity. On the first day, trades will receive a 1.8x multiplier, providing a significant boost to participants who engage early. This multiplier is designed to encourage traders to start trading as soon as the competition begins.

Participants can track their trade volume by clicking 'Join' on the Binance App event page. It's important to note that only buy volume will be counted towards the competition, with selling activity excluded from the calculations. This approach aims to focus on buying activity, rewarding those who contribute to the market's liquidity. The competition is structured to engage traders actively and offer substantial rewards to those who participate. With $200,000 worth of rewards available, traders have a significant incentive to join and maximize their trading volume during the event.

data.title: Sui Protocol Aftermath Finance Identifies Security Vulnerability
data.description: Aftermath Finance, a liquidity staking protocol on the Sui network, has identified a security vulnerability within its system. According to Foresight News, the team is actively investigating the issue in collaboration with security partners. As a precautionary measure, the protocol has been temporarily suspended, and steps are being taken to minimize any potential impact on user funds.

data.title: Whale Address Takes Significant Loss on Leveraged DOGE Position
data.description: A whale address beginning with 0x8d0E has reportedly engaged in a leveraged trade involving 40 million DOGE, according to Foresight News. The trade, executed with a 10x leverage, amounts to approximately $4.4 million. Currently, the address is experiencing an unrealized loss of $13.74 million.
